they want their daffodil to be a unkillable juggernaut
that does all the heavy lifting

celeste's card does 10 damage x (amount of allies u have dead) so by default it does 10x1 and in best case scenario it does 10x3 if celeste is the only one alive

with pure silver beginner's heart, Sorel will steal it from her when celeste dies so Sorel will do 10x3 

However sorel would have Rose Victory (up to +3 power) making it 13x3 and she has her own source of vulnerability, meaning it can realistically go up to like 16x3

in addition to that a lot of the problem with sorel is you decap+vuln someone for 60=>75 damage and then... you just can't kill them. With an extra 40 damage reach you can basically kill anyone in the game

board gamin

``` • Deckbuilder duel game. Kinda like AEGIS, Robot Quest: Arena, Sentinel Tactics or Nexus Ops

• Played on a board comprised of hexagonal  tiles. 

• Standard fare, you pick an Awaker to play and you duke it out on the battlefield. You can also make a team of 4 Awakers to fight another team of 4, but the deckbuilding rules differ.

• Each character has two decks, 1 for the strikes & defends, and another for the specialised cards(Like Inscryption). The strikes & defends can sometimes have their own bonuses depending on the character. This changes in the Team mode, where all the cards are now placed in one deck, number of strikes and defends are reduced, ofc.```

``` •Rouse effects are only available after reaching a certain HP threshold, only then do they activate, 

• Special cards cost Arithmetica. The regular strike and defends do not. You gain +1 Arithmetica at the start of a round( A round passes after you and your enemy finish your turn) up to a max of 6 Arithmetica.
Arithmetica does not carry over into the next turn, simply resets to the max number of Arithmetica you can have. Some effects can increase the Arithmetica cap or let you retain it
```

care to explain it to me 🙂
u get into emotions and then u basically get passive buff
so fear gives u power then any power u get after that gets extra power
sorrow gets you shield and any shield gets u extra shield
joy lets u retain all of your cards and any energy u didnt spend goes to next round
so just by existing in sorrow stance you'll have like +25% more shields
just by being in fear stance you'll get +25% more power gen
alright, so getting into the emotion gives you a power/shield boost straight ? then any other power/shield boost you get you get more on top ?
